_comment: Passage of lines (triplex acies): a fresh player reserve line stands behind a thinned player front line already fighting an enemy line. The player box-selects the three fresh units, presses X to switch the group-order mode to Distributed, then right-clicks the CENTER tired unit. Distributed relief pairs each fresh unit with its own nearby engaged tired unit -- sorted by proximity to the CLICKED unit, not to the reliever's own position, so a pairing can cross rather than always matching the nearest fresh unit to the nearest tired one -- instead of every reliever piling onto the single fight clicked. All three tired units get a real retreat order and all three fresh units close on their own partner's fight by the end of the clip.
